TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Abdulla_Yameen, title = Abdulla_Yameen, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abdulla_Yameen} }

S.FORM: == Abdulla Yameen == Takaray a Sowal I 1959 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 21 a romi'ad masofoc ci Aputola Yamen Aputole (Abdulla Yameen Abdul Gayoom), o citanengay to sici ato kicai. I 2013 miheca tahira i 2018 miheca saka 11 folad malacontong no Martifu a kitakit (malamikomoday a tamdaw). O safa no i'ayaway a contong ci Mumon Abdulla Yameen Atotule Kaiyimu, ona tamdaw i, 30 ko mihecaan ko kalacontong ningra. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Marifu anini i ci Abdulla Yameen, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 17 a romi'ad. lalamod 配偶 O fafahi ni Aputola Yamen (Abdulla Yameen) ci Fadimat Iprahim (Fathimath Ibrahim), sasepat ko wawa nangra, I 2015 miheca saka 9 folad saka28 a romi'ad toya papacem, nai SawtiAlabo a minokay, maepod to hikoki, mamikalic to mafasiway a tamina , tatayra i Maley , kinafanaan haw i, mamangata to toya Minato no contong (Izzuddeen Faalan 總統碼頭), "pong" sa a mapokca koya tamina, fafahi ni Aputola Yamen (Abdulla Yameen) mangeroay maketonay ko 'okak, miniwing to cecay a folad i isiisingan, oya to tatosa a midamaay ci congtongan i, o cecay i, caay kamaan, o cecay to i, karetengay to doka' no mira. salikaka 兄弟姐妹 O kaka ni Abdulla Yameen haw i, nai 1978 a miheca saka 11 folad ko pisatapang nira a malasawara'an, tolo polo' a miheca ko malasawara'an no Maldives . o safa ci Abdulla Yameen enemay a miheca ko malasawara'an ningra, misatanam a miliyaw caay to ka pakaala, mafalic to. natayalan 事蹟 misakayakay 橋 nai 2013 tangasa i 2018 a malacongtong ci Abdulla Yameen (Abdulla Yameen) i, iraay ko natayalan nira, saka cecay, i 2015 mipatireng to kayakay (Sinamalé 大橋), o pitongal o pitongodan to sawali no Maley ato i kitiraan no Wieyna toya ka^tip no Helhulay a kanatal (Hulhulé 島), onini a kayakay ira ko pirakatan no tosiya/paliding, tatihi ira ko no otofay a pirakatan, ilawac no lalan o no pirakatan no tamdamdaw, i 2016 a miheca misatapang misanga, tayni to i 2018 a miheca falo folad 30 a roma'ad pangangan han to ni Yameen (Yameen) koni kayakay to sinamale (Sinamalé 大橋). misakakahad 擴建 Mitongal misakakahad to kitiraan no hikoki ato sakitamdaw a lalan itini i Velana (Velana 國際機場),manga'ay toko hikoki a naifafekan a maepod, tedac sato a micomod to kitiraan no hikoki, malowan to ko pisataliyoliyoc no hikoki itini tona cikang, i 2018 a miheca fangcal to a matongal a sakakahad ko pahikokian/hikociw. Anini tona pahikokian maedeng maparo' ko 150 a mang matongal to 800 a mang, ci cedi to a midama mipacafay to alomanay a tamdamdaw. Ira haca ko roma a mipatirengan nira to pahikokian, caloway aloman aloman ko tayniay a tamdaw. 2019 a miheca adihayay ko harateng nira, misanga patireng to roma faelohay a ono nanom a hikociw, fangcal a malaheci i, malinah to maemin a tayni tona faelohay a kitiraan. misaloma' 建造房屋 Itini malasawara'an ci Aputola Yamen (Abdulla Yameen) haw i, mafana' a miherateng to sakanga'ayaw no Maley (Hulhumalé 首都胡魯馬累), i 2014 a miheca misatapang to mikarkar mipatireng to ta'angayay a kamaro'an, misakapah to lalan, caay ko patireng aca, mipacakat ho to kakahaday a kiloma'an, pangangan han nira to Hiyaa (Hiyaa), maedeng nga'ay ko polo' a mang a tamdaw a maro' itita, saska tosa nira a rayray mamipatireng to kaloma'an, no tamdaw, edeng maro' ko cecay a mang ira ko falo polo' ko mamamaro'. paisingan 醫療設施 Pakayni tona o sakanga'ayaw no adada'ay a tamdamdaw, ira haca ko harateng ni Yameen (Yameen), nga'ay a maalah ko doka' anca o adada', patirengen nira ko fa^lohay a pikcoran, tosa polo ira ko lima ko tongroh, laloma' ira ko safangcalay no matayalay a ising, micomod to ko calowayay a kikay, pangangan han to ni Yameen (Yameen) toni paisingan to Dharumavantha. pito'oran 信仰 O pitooran ni Aputola Yamen Aputole Kayimo (Abdulla Yameen Abdul Gayoom) i, o Islam kakafitan i papotal
S.PHON: == ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən == takaraj a so~uwaɾ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi apo~u~uto~uɾa jamən apo~u~uto~uɾə (ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾ *ajo~uo~um), o~u ʦitanəŋaj to~u siʦi ato~u kiʦai. i **** miħəʦa taħira i **** miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ maɾaʦo~unto~uŋ no~u martifo~u~u a kitakit (maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw). o~u safa no~u iʡajawaj a ʦo~unto~uŋ ʦi mo~u~umo~un ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən ato~uto~u~uɾə kaijimo~u~u, o~una tamɬ~ɮaw i, ** ko~u miħəʦaan ko~u kaɾaʦo~unto~uŋ niŋra. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u marifo~u~u anini i ʦi ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. ɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ ** o~u fafaħi ni apo~u~uto~uɾa jamən (ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən) ʦi faɬ~ɮimat ipraħim (fatħimatħ ib~b~vraħim), sasəpat ko~u wawa naŋra, i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~uja papaʦəm, nai sawtiaɾab~b~vo~u a mino~ukaj, maəpo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ħiko~uki, mamikaɾiʦ to~u mafasiwaj a tamina , tatajra i maɾəj , kinafanaan ħaw i, mamaŋata to~u to~uja minato~u no~u ʦo~unto~uŋ (i**o~u~uɬ~ɮɬ~ɮəən faaɾan ****), "po~uŋ" sa a mapo~ukʦa ko~uja tamina, fafaħi ni apo~u~uto~uɾa jamən (ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən) maŋəro~uaj makəto~unaj ko~u ʡo~ukak, miniwiŋ to~u ʦəʦaj a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ i isiisiŋan, o~uja to~u tato~usa a miɬ~ɮamaaj ʦi ʦo~uŋto~uŋan i, o~u ʦəʦaj i, ʦaaj kamaan, o~u ʦəʦaj to~u i, karətəŋaj to~u ɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ no~u mira. saɾikaka **** o~u kaka ni ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən ħaw i, nai **** a miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u pisatapaŋ nira a maɾasawaraʡan, to~uɾo~u po~uɾo~uʡ a miħəʦa ko~u maɾasawaraʡan no~u maɾɬ~ɮib~vəs . o~u safa ʦi ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən ənəmaj a miħəʦa ko~u maɾasawaraʡan niŋra, misatanam a miɾijaw ʦaaj to~u ka pakaaɾa, mafaɾiʦ to~u. natajaɾan ** misakajakaj * nai **** taŋasa i **** a maɾaʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən (ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən) i, iraaj ko~u natajaɾan nira, saka ʦəʦaj, i **** mipatirəŋ to~u kajakaj (sinamaɾ* **), o~u pito~uŋaɾ o~u pito~uŋo~uɬ~ɮan to~u sawaɾi no~u maɾəj ato~u i kitiraan no~u wiəjna to~uja kaʔtip no~u ħəɾħo~u~uɾaj a kanataɾ (ħo~u~uɾħo~u~uɾ* *), o~unini a kajakaj ira ko~u pirakatan no~u to~usija/paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ, tatiħi ira ko~u no~u o~uto~ufaj a pirakatan, iɾawaʦ no~u ɾaɾan o~u no~u pirakatan no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, i **** a miħəʦa misatapaŋ misaŋa, tajni to~u i **** a miħəʦa faɾo~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** a ro~umaʡaɬ~ɮ paŋaŋan ħan to~u ni jaməən (jaməən) ko~uni kajakaj to~u sinamaɾə (sinamaɾ* **). misakakaħaɬ~ɮ ** mito~uŋaɾ misakakaħaɬ~ɮ to~u kitiraan no~u ħiko~uki ato~u sakitamɬ~ɮaw a ɾaɾan itini i b~vəɾana (b~vəɾana ****),maŋaʡaj to~uko~u ħiko~uki a naifafəkan a maəpo~uɬ~ɮ, təɬ~ɮaʦ sato~u a miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kitiraan no~u ħiko~uki, maɾo~uwan to~u ko~u pisataɾijo~uɾijo~uʦ no~u ħiko~uki itini to~una ʦikaŋ, i **** a miħəʦa faŋʦaɾ to~u a mato~uŋaɾ a sakakaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u paħiko~ukian/ħiko~uʦiw. anini to~una paħiko~ukian maəɬ~ɮəŋ maparo~uʡ ko~u *** a maŋ mato~uŋaɾ to~u *** a maŋ, ʦi ʦəɬ~ɮi to~u a miɬ~ɮama mipaʦafaj to~u aɾo~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw. ira ħaʦa ko~u ro~uma a mipatirəŋan nira to~u paħiko~ukian, ʦaɾo~uwaj aɾo~uman aɾo~uman ko~u tajniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. **** a miħəʦa aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u ħaratəŋ nira, misaŋa patirəŋ to~u ro~uma faəɾo~uħaj a o~uno~u nano~um a ħiko~uʦiw, faŋʦaɾ a maɾaħəʦi i, maɾinaħ to~u maəmin a tajni to~una faəɾo~uħaj a kitiraan. misaɾo~umaʡ **** itini maɾasawaraʡan ʦi apo~u~uto~uɾa jamən (ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən) ħaw i, mafanaʡ a miħəratəŋ to~u sakaŋaʡajaw no~u maɾəj (ħo~u~uɾħo~u~umaɾ* ******), i **** a miħəʦa misatapaŋ to~u mikarkar mipatirəŋ to~u taʡaŋajaj a kamaro~uʡan, misakapaħ to~u ɾaɾan, ʦaaj ko~u patirəŋ aʦa, mipaʦakat ħo~u to~u kakaħaɬ~ɮaj a kiɾo~umaʡan, paŋaŋan ħan nira to~u ħijaa (ħijaa), maəɬ~ɮəŋ ŋaʡaj ko~u po~uɾo~uʡ a maŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw a maro~uʡ itita, saska to~usa nira a rajraj mamipatirəŋ to~u kaɾo~umaʡan, no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, əɬ~ɮəŋ maro~uʡ ko~u ʦəʦaj a maŋ ira ko~u faɾo~u po~uɾo~uʡ ko~u mamamaro~uʡ. paisiŋan **** pakajni to~una o~u sakaŋaʡajaw no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaʡaj a tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, ira ħaʦa ko~u ħaratəŋ ni jaməən (jaməən), ŋaʡaj a maaɾaħ ko~u ɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ anʦa o~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaʡ, patirəŋən nira ko~u faʔɾo~uħaj a pikʦo~uran, to~usa po~uɾo~u ira ko~u ɾima ko~u to~uŋro~uħ, ɾaɾo~umaʡ ira ko~u safaŋʦaɾaj no~u matajaɾaj a isiŋ, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u ʦaɾo~uwajaj a kikaj, paŋaŋan ħan to~u ni jaməən (jaməən) to~uni paisiŋan to~u ɬ~ɮħaro~u~umab~vantħa. pito~uʡo~uran ** o~u pito~uo~uran ni apo~u~uto~uɾa jamən apo~u~uto~uɾə kajimo~u (ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾ *ajo~uo~um) i, o~u isɾam kakafitan i papo~utaɾ
S.FORM: == Abdulla Yameen == Takaray a Sowal I 1959 a miheca saka 5 folad saka 21 a romi'ad masofoc ci Aputola Yamen Aputole (Abdulla Yameen Abdul Gayoom), o citanengay to sici ato kicai. I 2013 miheca tahira i 2018 miheca saka 11 folad malacontong no Martifu a kitakit (malamikomoday a tamdaw). O safa no i'ayaway a contong ci Mumon Abdulla Yameen Atotule Kaiyimu, ona tamdaw i, 30 ko mihecaan ko kalacontong ningra. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Marifu anini i ci Abdulla Yameen, patirengan a romi'ad i 2013 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 17 a romi'ad. lalamod 配偶 O fafahi ni Aputola Yamen (Abdulla Yameen) ci Fadimat Iprahim (Fathimath Ibrahim), sasepat ko wawa nangra, I 2015 miheca saka 9 folad saka28 a romi'ad toya papacem, nai SawtiAlabo a minokay, maepod to hikoki, mamikalic to mafasiway a tamina , tatayra i Maley , kinafanaan haw i, mamangata to toya Minato no contong (Izzuddeen Faalan 總統碼頭), "pong" sa a mapokca koya tamina, fafahi ni Aputola Yamen (Abdulla Yameen) mangeroay maketonay ko 'okak, miniwing to cecay a folad i isiisingan, oya to tatosa a midamaay ci congtongan i, o cecay i, caay kamaan, o cecay to i, karetengay to doka' no mira. salikaka 兄弟姐妹 O kaka ni Abdulla Yameen haw i, nai 1978 a miheca saka 11 folad ko pisatapang nira a malasawara'an, tolo polo' a miheca ko malasawara'an no Maldives . o safa ci Abdulla Yameen enemay a miheca ko malasawara'an ningra, misatanam a miliyaw caay to ka pakaala, mafalic to. natayalan 事蹟 misakayakay 橋 nai 2013 tangasa i 2018 a malacongtong ci Abdulla Yameen (Abdulla Yameen) i, iraay ko natayalan nira, saka cecay, i 2015 mipatireng to kayakay (Sinamalé 大橋), o pitongal o pitongodan to sawali no Maley ato i kitiraan no Wieyna toya ka^tip no Helhulay a kanatal (Hulhulé 島), onini a kayakay ira ko pirakatan no tosiya/paliding, tatihi ira ko no otofay a pirakatan, ilawac no lalan o no pirakatan no tamdamdaw, i 2016 a miheca misatapang misanga, tayni to i 2018 a miheca falo folad 30 a roma'ad pangangan han to ni Yameen (Yameen) koni kayakay to sinamale (Sinamalé 大橋). misakakahad 擴建 Mitongal misakakahad to kitiraan no hikoki ato sakitamdaw a lalan itini i Velana (Velana 國際機場),manga'ay toko hikoki a naifafekan a maepod, tedac sato a micomod to kitiraan no hikoki, malowan to ko pisataliyoliyoc no hikoki itini tona cikang, i 2018 a miheca fangcal to a matongal a sakakahad ko pahikokian/hikociw. Anini tona pahikokian maedeng maparo' ko 150 a mang matongal to 800 a mang, ci cedi to a midama mipacafay to alomanay a tamdamdaw. Ira haca ko roma a mipatirengan nira to pahikokian, caloway aloman aloman ko tayniay a tamdaw. 2019 a miheca adihayay ko harateng nira, misanga patireng to roma faelohay a ono nanom a hikociw, fangcal a malaheci i, malinah to maemin a tayni tona faelohay a kitiraan. misaloma' 建造房屋 Itini malasawara'an ci Aputola Yamen (Abdulla Yameen) haw i, mafana' a miherateng to sakanga'ayaw no Maley (Hulhumalé 首都胡魯馬累), i 2014 a miheca misatapang to mikarkar mipatireng to ta'angayay a kamaro'an, misakapah to lalan, caay ko patireng aca, mipacakat ho to kakahaday a kiloma'an, pangangan han nira to Hiyaa (Hiyaa), maedeng nga'ay ko polo' a mang a tamdaw a maro' itita, saska tosa nira a rayray mamipatireng to kaloma'an, no tamdaw, edeng maro' ko cecay a mang ira ko falo polo' ko mamamaro'. paisingan 醫療設施 Pakayni tona o sakanga'ayaw no adada'ay a tamdamdaw, ira haca ko harateng ni Yameen (Yameen), nga'ay a maalah ko doka' anca o adada', patirengen nira ko fa^lohay a pikcoran, tosa polo ira ko lima ko tongroh, laloma' ira ko safangcalay no matayalay a ising, micomod to ko calowayay a kikay, pangangan han to ni Yameen (Yameen) toni paisingan to Dharumavantha. pito'oran 信仰 O pitooran ni Aputola Yamen Aputole Kayimo (Abdulla Yameen Abdul Gayoom) i, o Islam kakafitan i papotal
S.PHON: == ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən == takaraj a so~uwaɾ i **** a miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maso~ufo~uʦ ʦi apo~u~uto~uɾa jamən apo~u~uto~uɾə (ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾ *ajo~uo~um), o~u ʦitanəŋaj to~u siʦi ato~u kiʦai. i **** miħəʦa taħira i **** miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ maɾaʦo~unto~uŋ no~u martifo~u~u a kitakit (maɾamiko~umo~uɬ~ɮaj a tamɬ~ɮaw). o~u safa no~u iʡajawaj a ʦo~unto~uŋ ʦi mo~u~umo~un ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən ato~uto~u~uɾə kaijimo~u~u, o~una tamɬ~ɮaw i, ** ko~u miħəʦaan ko~u kaɾaʦo~unto~uŋ niŋra. o~u sawaraʡan no~u kitakit no~u marifo~u~u anini i ʦi ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən, patirəŋan a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i **** a miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. ɾaɾamo~uɬ~ɮ ** o~u fafaħi ni apo~u~uto~uɾa jamən (ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən) ʦi faɬ~ɮimat ipraħim (fatħimatħ ib~b~vraħim), sasəpat ko~u wawa naŋra, i **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ to~uja papaʦəm, nai sawtiaɾab~b~vo~u a mino~ukaj, maəpo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ħiko~uki, mamikaɾiʦ to~u mafasiwaj a tamina , tatajra i maɾəj , kinafanaan ħaw i, mamaŋata to~u to~uja minato~u no~u ʦo~unto~uŋ (i**o~u~uɬ~ɮɬ~ɮəən faaɾan ****), "po~uŋ" sa a mapo~ukʦa ko~uja tamina, fafaħi ni apo~u~uto~uɾa jamən (ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən) maŋəro~uaj makəto~unaj ko~u ʡo~ukak, miniwiŋ to~u ʦəʦaj a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ i isiisiŋan, o~uja to~u tato~usa a miɬ~ɮamaaj ʦi ʦo~uŋto~uŋan i, o~u ʦəʦaj i, ʦaaj kamaan, o~u ʦəʦaj to~u i, karətəŋaj to~u ɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ no~u mira. saɾikaka **** o~u kaka ni ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən ħaw i, nai **** a miħəʦa saka ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ko~u pisatapaŋ nira a maɾasawaraʡan, to~uɾo~u po~uɾo~uʡ a miħəʦa ko~u maɾasawaraʡan no~u maɾɬ~ɮib~vəs . o~u safa ʦi ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən ənəmaj a miħəʦa ko~u maɾasawaraʡan niŋra, misatanam a miɾijaw ʦaaj to~u ka pakaaɾa, mafaɾiʦ to~u. natajaɾan ** misakajakaj * nai **** taŋasa i **** a maɾaʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən (ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən) i, iraaj ko~u natajaɾan nira, saka ʦəʦaj, i **** mipatirəŋ to~u kajakaj (sinamaɾ* **), o~u pito~uŋaɾ o~u pito~uŋo~uɬ~ɮan to~u sawaɾi no~u maɾəj ato~u i kitiraan no~u wiəjna to~uja kaʔtip no~u ħəɾħo~u~uɾaj a kanataɾ (ħo~u~uɾħo~u~uɾ* *), o~unini a kajakaj ira ko~u pirakatan no~u to~usija/paɾiɬ~ɮiŋ, tatiħi ira ko~u no~u o~uto~ufaj a pirakatan, iɾawaʦ no~u ɾaɾan o~u no~u pirakatan no~u tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, i **** a miħəʦa misatapaŋ misaŋa, tajni to~u i **** a miħəʦa faɾo~u fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** a ro~umaʡaɬ~ɮ paŋaŋan ħan to~u ni jaməən (jaməən) ko~uni kajakaj to~u sinamaɾə (sinamaɾ* **). misakakaħaɬ~ɮ ** mito~uŋaɾ misakakaħaɬ~ɮ to~u kitiraan no~u ħiko~uki ato~u sakitamɬ~ɮaw a ɾaɾan itini i b~vəɾana (b~vəɾana ****),maŋaʡaj to~uko~u ħiko~uki a naifafəkan a maəpo~uɬ~ɮ, təɬ~ɮaʦ sato~u a miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kitiraan no~u ħiko~uki, maɾo~uwan to~u ko~u pisataɾijo~uɾijo~uʦ no~u ħiko~uki itini to~una ʦikaŋ, i **** a miħəʦa faŋʦaɾ to~u a mato~uŋaɾ a sakakaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u paħiko~ukian/ħiko~uʦiw. anini to~una paħiko~ukian maəɬ~ɮəŋ maparo~uʡ ko~u *** a maŋ mato~uŋaɾ to~u *** a maŋ, ʦi ʦəɬ~ɮi to~u a miɬ~ɮama mipaʦafaj to~u aɾo~umanaj a tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw. ira ħaʦa ko~u ro~uma a mipatirəŋan nira to~u paħiko~ukian, ʦaɾo~uwaj aɾo~uman aɾo~uman ko~u tajniaj a tamɬ~ɮaw. **** a miħəʦa aɬ~ɮiħajaj ko~u ħaratəŋ nira, misaŋa patirəŋ to~u ro~uma faəɾo~uħaj a o~uno~u nano~um a ħiko~uʦiw, faŋʦaɾ a maɾaħəʦi i, maɾinaħ to~u maəmin a tajni to~una faəɾo~uħaj a kitiraan. misaɾo~umaʡ **** itini maɾasawaraʡan ʦi apo~u~uto~uɾa jamən (ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən) ħaw i, mafanaʡ a miħəratəŋ to~u sakaŋaʡajaw no~u maɾəj (ħo~u~uɾħo~u~umaɾ* ******), i **** a miħəʦa misatapaŋ to~u mikarkar mipatirəŋ to~u taʡaŋajaj a kamaro~uʡan, misakapaħ to~u ɾaɾan, ʦaaj ko~u patirəŋ aʦa, mipaʦakat ħo~u to~u kakaħaɬ~ɮaj a kiɾo~umaʡan, paŋaŋan ħan nira to~u ħijaa (ħijaa), maəɬ~ɮəŋ ŋaʡaj ko~u po~uɾo~uʡ a maŋ a tamɬ~ɮaw a maro~uʡ itita, saska to~usa nira a rajraj mamipatirəŋ to~u kaɾo~umaʡan, no~u tamɬ~ɮaw, əɬ~ɮəŋ maro~uʡ ko~u ʦəʦaj a maŋ ira ko~u faɾo~u po~uɾo~uʡ ko~u mamamaro~uʡ. paisiŋan **** pakajni to~una o~u sakaŋaʡajaw no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaʡaj a tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw, ira ħaʦa ko~u ħaratəŋ ni jaməən (jaməən), ŋaʡaj a maaɾaħ ko~u ɬ~ɮo~ukaʡ anʦa o~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaʡ, patirəŋən nira ko~u faʔɾo~uħaj a pikʦo~uran, to~usa po~uɾo~u ira ko~u ɾima ko~u to~uŋro~uħ, ɾaɾo~umaʡ ira ko~u safaŋʦaɾaj no~u matajaɾaj a isiŋ, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u ʦaɾo~uwajaj a kikaj, paŋaŋan ħan to~u ni jaməən (jaməən) to~uni paisiŋan to~u ɬ~ɮħaro~u~umab~vantħa. pito~uʡo~uran ** o~u pito~uo~uran ni apo~u~uto~uɾa jamən apo~u~uto~uɾə kajimo~u (ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾɾa jaməən ab~b~vɬ~ɮo~u~uɾ *ajo~uo~um) i, o~u isɾam kakafitan i papo~utaɾ
